hero.title: Build Your Online Store in Minutes
hero.subtitle: Matgary is a powerful SaaS platform that lets you create, customize, and manage your own e-commerce store with zero coding skills.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: All the tools to launch and grow your online business

pwa.title: Installable PWA
pwa.description: Your store works like a native app on mobile and desktop

notifications.title: Real-time Alerts
notifications.description: Get instant push notifications when new orders come in

branding.title: Custom Branding
branding.description: Full theme customization — colors, fonts, and logo

i18n.title: Arabic & English
i18n.description: Full RTL support for Arabic-speaking customers

products.title: Products
products.empty: No products yet. Add your first product!
products.name: Product Name

settings.title: Store Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your store settings, branding, and features
settings.generalDescription: Configure your store name, URL, and general settings.
settings.brandingDescription: Upload your store logo and favicon to build brand recognition
settings.logoDescription: Your main brand image. Appears in the header and checkout.
settings.faviconDescription: Small icon for browser tabs. Square format works best.
settings.themeDescription: Customize your store branding — colors, fonts, and more.
settings.themePresetsDescription: Choose a pre-designed color scheme or customize your own
settings.customColorsDescription: Fine-tune your brand colors for a unique look
settings.primaryColorDescription: Main brand color for buttons and links
settings.enableWhatsAppDescription: Show a WhatsApp chat button for customer support
settings.enableReviewsDescription: Allow customers to leave product reviews
settings.enableDarkModeDescription: Allow customers to switch to dark mode
settings.enablePushDescription: Receive browser notifications for new orders
settings.enableSoundDescription: Play a sound when new orders arrive
settings.enableEmailDescription: Get email notifications for new orders

notificationSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettings.label: Notifications
notificationSettings.empty: You have no new notifications right now. System alerts will appear here.
